bot_stopped_alert:
**{name}** ({id}) has stopped unexpectedly!
Would you like me to restart it? Use `/restart bot_id:{id}` command.
manager_updating: **{name}** update in progress... This may take a while.
error_id_not_found: The specified Bot ID is not in the configuration.
error_manager_log_empty: The Manager log file is empty.
error_admin_only: Administrator permissions or the designated admin role required.
error_admin_context: You do not have permission or are in the wrong channel.
error_admin_channel_only: This can only be used in the admin channel.
desc_update: [Bot Dev] Update and restart a bot by ID.
desc_restart: [Bot Dev] Restart a bot without update.
desc_rollback: [Bot Dev] Rollback bot to previous Git state (HEAD@{1}).
desc_logs: [Bot Dev] Get last N lines of a bot log file.
desc_manager_logs: [Bot Dev] Get last N lines of the Bot Manager log.
desc_manager_restart: [Bot Dev] Immediate restart of Bot Manager.
desc_manager_update: [Bot Dev] Git pull, pip install and restart Bot Manager.
desc_status: Shows the status and resource usage of managed bots.
desc_purge: [Bot Dev] Deletes all messages in the current channel.
desc_param_bot_id: Select a bot from the list
desc_param_lines: Number of lines to fetch (default: 50, all: 0)
sync_success_global: **{count}** commands synced globally. Restart the Bot Manager!
sync_success_copy: Global commands copied and **{count}** commands synced.
clear_commands_success: All slash commands cleared. Restart the Bot Manager!
author: Author
status_refreshed: Status panel recreated with fresh Git stats.
purge_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete ALL messages in this channel?
desc_param_public: Set to True to show the info card to everyone (Admin only).
INFO_DESC: Hi! I'm FixItFixa, the server's lead mechanic. I keep the gears turning in the background. I monitor the telemetry of my bots, fix network leaks, and ensure every sub-system is running at 100% efficiency.
INFO_FEATURES_DESC:
• `/info` - A quick overview of my duties.
• `/status` - Subsystem snapshot anywhere, detailed telemetry in {admin_channel}.

*Note: Heavy tools are restricted to {admin_role} personnel.*
INFO_FOOTER: Gearbox status: NOMINAL. All sub-systems calibrated.
